title: Supplementary files for "Tristetraprolin Affects Invasion-Associated Genes Expression and Cell Motility in Triple-Negative Breast Cancer Model"
author: Hubiernatorova, Anastasiia
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Track1 and Track3 - raw numerical data on cell tracking; Morphology-DXR treated - raw images of the cells, treated with DXR; Morphology ecTTP+WT - morphology of wild-type and TTP-overexpressing cells; RAW data qPCR - rew data of gene expression experiments
steps_raw: Track1 and Track3 - raw numerical data on cell tracking; Morphology-DXR treated - raw images of the cells, treated with DXR; Morphology ecTTP+WT - morphology of wild-type and TTP-overexpressing cells; RAW data qPCR - rew data of gene expression experiments
